title: HKU深圳醫院急症主管樊潔玲借刀出假醫生紙

replies.msg:
是咁的，我係大窩口附近街坊，有睇開大窩口康民醫務中心。
但係我咁耐以黎都未見過亦未睇過樊醫生，就連門上面嘅名都只係得阮醫生一個。


因為我睇開算係熟客，所以都算了解到當中少許細節。聽番診所講，樊醫生的確曾經有使用過以上地址同公司名註冊過診所，但現已轉手到阮醫生全權打理，而持有人亦只有男醫生 阮醫生一人，並非上述女醫生。

所以，HKU深圳醫院急症主管樊潔玲係 借舊地址、舊資料，去幫人出假醫生紙、含血噴人、抹黑同行、有違專業。同現時使用該診所嘅醫生完全無關。

作為睇開嘅街坊，我可以話阮醫生絕對係一位有醫德、細心專業嘅好醫生。尤其對老人家同小朋友都好細心。而且，有其中一種即使喺藥房賣到5X蚊嘅藥，都唔加收特效藥錢，絕對係良心醫生。

今次絕對係一次飛來橫禍
所以希望大家真係唔好搞錯人，要搞嘅記得係搞番深圳醫院同瑪麗醫院嘅樊潔玲。

老實講，好人好者點會本身已經喺瑪麗醫院，仲走去做HKU深圳醫院嘅主管，仲要出埋假醫生紙比藍絲。係估唔到依個所謂「醫生」仲要嫁禍同行，陷他人於不義。

醫務委員會如果唔介入
我屌你老味
幫推 以正視聽
做醫生做到咁仆街
推推推推推推推推推推
阮醫生可以去port佢啦，用假地址應該罪加一等

對醫生作出投訴
投訴的程序

你可隨時與我們討論你的問題。若決定正式作出投訴，請盡量提供以下我們所需的資料：

你的全名、地址和聯絡電話號碼。
有關醫生的全名和地址。
有關你認為醫生所犯錯誤的細節。
事發日期。
有關文件的副本以及例如錄音帶或相片等其他證據。
事件中可作證人者或任何可憑個人所知支持你所作投訴的人士的姓名和地址。
投訴信可以中文或英文書寫。你亦可選擇利用我們所載的這連結會以新視窗打開。表格作出投訴。

https://www.mchk.org.hk/tc_chi/whatsnew/index.html

希望大家幫手Spread開唔好搞到仁醫，大窩口附近已經冇咩醫生可以睇
除左班老到就黎退休嘅就得番一兩個，如果唔係一係就要行上葵盛葵涌邨，一係就要去到荃豐

仲要睇埋個藍絲醫生List就發覺其實更加少Choice
https://lihkg.com/thread/1564886/page/1
(各位街坊自己睇下啦，第78個人名都係大窩口....)

replies.msg:
Letter of Complaint: Serious Misconduct of Dr Fan Kit Ling

Dear Sir/ Madam,

I am writing to lodge an official complaint against Dr Fan Kit Ling for her misconduct of engaging in a FRAUD.

It has come to my knowledge that there is a receipt signed by Dr Fan Kit Ling dated 16/9/2019 that was issued to a patient. The receipts writes that the Faith Medical Group Limited had received HKD 1,000 for consultation and minor surgery. It certainly is not sick leave certificate as it states "Receipt" on it with the amount paid. It could not have been issued today as today is only 14/9/2019. The receipt surely was not a slip of hand either, as there is already a receipt dated 14/9/2019 with the exact same amount and same treatment. Please find attached the relevant receipts.

Based on the receipt, there is a high chance that Dr Fan Kit Ling was engaged in a fraud with her patients by issuing fake medical receipts so that her patients could claim insurance for the amount.

This is a serious matter undermining the entire image of doctors and their integrity. Dr Fan Kit Ling could not escape from such unacceptable misconduct. Doctor is a well-respected career. The public has faith in them, particularly in their integrity. I appreciate the effort made by your Council to maintain that in the past and I believe that your Council will perform the same in the future.

I look forward to receiving your reply regarding the matter. Thank you.

Yours faithfully,
Concerned citizen Mr X

quote.msg:
是咁的，我係大窩口附近街坊，有睇開大窩口康民醫務中心。
但係我咁耐以黎都未見過亦未睇過樊醫生，就連門上面嘅名都只係得阮醫生一個。


因為我睇開算係熟客，所以都算了解到當中少許細節。聽番診所講，樊醫生的確曾經有使用過以上地址同公司名註冊過診所，但現已轉手到阮醫生全權打理，而持有人亦只有男醫生 阮醫生一人，並非上述女醫生。

所以，HKU深圳醫院急症主管樊潔玲係 借舊地址、舊資料，去幫人出假醫生紙、含血噴人、抹黑同行、有違專業。同現時使用該診所嘅醫生完全無關。

作為睇開嘅街坊，我可以話阮醫生絕對係一位有醫德、細心專業嘅好醫生。尤其對老人家同小朋友都好細心。而且，有其中一種即使喺藥房賣到5X蚊嘅藥，都唔加收特效藥錢，絕對係良心醫生。

今次絕對係一次飛來橫禍
所以希望大家真係唔好搞錯人，要搞嘅記得係搞番深圳醫院同瑪麗醫院嘅樊潔玲。

老實講，好人好者點會本身已經喺瑪麗醫院，仲走去做HKU深圳醫院嘅主管，仲要出埋假醫生紙比藍絲。係估唔到依個所謂「醫生」仲要嫁禍同行，陷他人於不義。

Letter of Complaint: Serious Misconduct of Dr Fan Kit Ling

Dear Sir/ Madam,

I am writing to lodge an official complaint against Dr Fan Kit Ling for her misconduct of engaging in a FRAUD.

It has come to my knowledge that there is a receipt signed by Dr Fan Kit Ling dated 16/9/2019 that was issued to a patient. The receipts writes that the Faith Medical Group Limited had received HKD 1,000 for consultation and minor surgery. It certainly is not sick leave certificate as it states "Receipt" on it with the amount paid. It could not have been issued today as today is only 14/9/2019. The receipt surely was not a slip of hand either, as there is already a receipt dated 14/9/2019 with the exact same amount and same treatment. Please find attached the relevant receipts.

Based on the receipt, there is a high chance that Dr Fan Kit Ling was engaged in a fraud with her patients by issuing fake medical receipts so that her patients could claim insurance for the amount.

This is a serious matter undermining the entire image of doctors and their integrity. Dr Fan Kit Ling could not escape from such unacceptable misconduct. Doctor is a well-respected career. The public has faith in them, particularly in their integrity. I appreciate the effort made by your Council to maintain that in the past and I believe that your Council will perform the same in the future.

I look forward to receiving your reply regarding the matter. Thank you.

Yours faithfully,
Concerned citizen Mr X

醫生有本Code of Professional Conduct ，基本上醫委會就係跟住本野去判，呢位傑出醫生今次仆晒街:

5.2 Principles and rules of good communication and information
dissemination
5.2.1 A doctor providing information to the public or his patients
must comply with the principles set out below.
5.2.1.1 Any information provided by a doctor to the public
or his patients must be:-
(a) accurate;
(b) factual;
(c) objectively verifiable;
(d) presented in a balanced manner (when referring
to the efficacy of particular treatment, both the
advantages and disadvantages should be set out).


26. Untrue or misleading certificates and similar documents
26.1 Doctors are required to issue reports and certificates for a variety of purposes (e.g. insurance claim forms, payment receipts, medical reports, vaccination certificates, sick leave certificates) on the basis that the truth of the contents can be accepted without question.
Doctors are expected to exercise care in issuing certificates and
similar documents, and should not include in them statements which they have not taken appropriate steps to verify.
26.2 A sick leave certificate can only be issued after proper medical
consultation of the patient by the doctor. The date of consultation and the date of issue must be truly stated in the certificate, including a certificate recommending retrospective sick leave.
26.3 Any doctor who in his professional capacity gives any certificate or similar document containing statements which are untrue, misleading or otherwise improper renders himself liable to disciplinary
proceedings. The signing of blank certificates is prohibited by the Council.
26.4 Doctors must not issue more than one original receipt in respect of the same payment. Copy receipts must be clearly stated to be copies or duplicates. If it is necessary to issue separate receipts for fractions of the payment for a single item of service, it should be clearly stated in each receipt the amount of the full payment and that the receipt is in respect of the part payment only.
